finding.title: MD5 + 空初始 key → API 获取活跃 key
finding.description: 签名使用 MD5(sorted_params + &key= + key)，初始 key 为空字符串用于 /app/key 端点，活跃 key 从 /login/h5/sign/token 响应中 AES-ECB 解密获取
evidence: app.js:4523 找到签名函数 I(e,t)，key 变量初始化为 var k=""
crypto_sign_verify 空 key 验证通过 /app/key 请求
AES-ECB 解密 sign_token 后提取活跃 key，验证 /allrank/listV2 通过
finding.js_snippet: var k=""; function I(e,t){var n={};for(var r in e){if(EXCLUDE_KEYS.indexOf(r)===-1)n[r]=e[r]}n.pub_timestamp=t;var o=Object.keys(n).sort();var a=[];for(var i=0;i<o.length;i++)a.push(o[i]+"="+n[o[i]]);return CryptoJS.MD5(a.join("&")+"&key="+k).toString().toUpperCase()}

proposed_addition:
## Pattern 1.1: MD5 + Key Suffix (Empty Initial Key)
**Variant of MD5_key_suffix where initial sign_key is empty string**
**JS Signature:** `var k=""; MD5(params + "&key=" + k).toUpperCase()`
**Key lifecycle:** Phase 1 use `k=""` for /app/key → Phase 2 get encrypted sign_token from /sign/token → AES decrypt → extract active key → use for all subsequent requests
**Cases:** mengyin_2026-05
